name: Harbour Master Voss
description: A broad-shouldered man in a naval coat, his expression carefully neutral. A ring of keys jangles at his belt.

start.text: State your business. The pier is for authorized personnel and registered passengers.
start.narrative: The harbour master blocks your path with folded arms.

looking.text: Look all you want, but don't touch the cargo. Ships come and go on tide and schedule. Everything here is properly documented and above board.
looking.narrative: His eyes don't quite match his confident tone.

cove.text: There's no such place. And if there were, it would be no concern of yours. Now, if you'll excuse me, I have a harbour to run.
cove.narrative: A muscle twitches in his jaw.
